title: ED Raids LPU, Other Properties Linked to Ashok Mittal Days After AAP MP Replaces Raghav Chadha in Rajya Sabha
description: The Enforcement Directorate (ED) conducted raids at 8–10 locations linked to AAP Rajya Sabha MP Ashok Kumar Mittal, including his residence, farmhouse, properties linked to his son, and the premises of Lovely Professional University (LPU) in Jalandhar and educational institutions in Gurugram, run by him.
